invariant_consensusRequirementsValid().notice: INVARIANT 4: Oracle Consensus Requirements MIN_CONFIRMATIONS must be achievable and reasonable

invariant_dailyCapsArePositive().notice: INVARIANT 3: Daily Caps Cannot Be Exceeded No worker or building should ever exceed their daily cap Note: This is enforced by reverts, so we verify the caps are set correctly

invariant_finalizationDelayReasonable().notice: INVARIANT 5: Finalization Delay Is Reasonable The delay should be long enough for disputes but not too long

invariant_minStakeReasonable().notice: INVARIANT 6: Minimum Stake Is Reasonable Oracle stake requirements should be meaningful but achievable

invariant_noNegativeBalances().notice: INVARIANT 7: No Negative Balances All balances must be non-negative (this should be impossible with uint256, but verify)

invariant_revenueSplitsSum100Percent().notice: INVARIANT 2: Revenue Split Correctness All tier configurations must sum to exactly 100% (10000 basis points)

invariant_totalSupplyEqualsBalances().notice: INVARIANT 1: Total Supply Consistency The total supply must always equal the sum of all individual balances
